title: The Merchant???
conditions: At least 100 Gold or a Foul Potion in your inventory
notes:
6 relics are randomly selected from a pool of 9 to stock the shop each visit. Relics cost [gold]50 Gold[/gold] each.

Throwing a [purple]Foul Potion[/purple] starts a fight with The Merchant??? ([blue]175 HP[/blue]). Winning rewards [gold]The Merchant's Rug???[/gold] plus all unsold relics still stocked in the shop.
